magic_items.name: Potion of Healing
magic_items.description: When consumed, this potion restores 2d4 + 2 hit points.

magic_items.name: Spell Scroll
magic_items.description: A spell scroll holds one cantrip or level 1 spell. If the spell is on your spell list, you can cast it from the scroll without material components; afterward the scroll crumbles to dust.
